description: Develop and refine the core logic of Sonic. Focus on reasoning, facts, and ethical alignment.
Implement mechanistic interpretability and constitutional AI safeguards into our model pipeline.
Build high-performance interfaces for Sonic 1.0. Experience with React and real-time streaming required.
Scale our distributed training clusters. Expert knowledge of Kubernetes and NVIDIA CUDA is essential.
Craft the visual identity and user experience for the world's most capable AI companion.
